title: Time Changer Express
description: A Client-side Fabric Mod that allows changing Minecraft in-game time, full configuration via commands
body:
TimeChanger lets you change the time and weather on your client without affecting the server or other players. Simple as that.

Want it to always be noon while you build? Use /ctime 6000. Tired of rain ruining your screenshots? Type /cweather clear and you're done. The server keeps running normally, but you see what you want to see.

It's client-side only, so it works on any server (unless they kick you for other reasons lol). The mod saves your settings in a config file, so you don't have to set it up every time you play.

Commands:

/ctime <number> - Change time (0-24000, or -1 to turn it off)
/cweather <clear/rain/thunder/unset> - Change weather
Works on Minecraft 1.21.8 with Fabric. No weird dependencies, just Fabric API. That's it.
